title: Senior Flutter Developer & Cross-Platform Architect
tagline: Building beautiful, performant Flutter apps from a single codebase
bio: Specialized Flutter developer with 5+ years building production apps for India's leading tech companies. Expert in Dart, Flutter state management (BLoC, Riverpod, Provider), custom widgets, and platform-specific integrations. 40+ Flutter apps shipped across fintech, health-tech, e-commerce, and live commerce verticals serving 30M+ users collectively.

highlights: Architected and shipped 8 production Flutter apps for iOS & Android from concept to store
Built modular Flutter packages used across 5+ client projects for faster development
Implemented custom platform channels for native camera, payments, and biometric integrations
Provide Flutter architecture consulting for startup teams of 5-15 engineers
Built Flutter-based seller app used by 500K+ merchants for real-time inventory management
Led the mobile checkout redesign with Flutter increasing conversion rate by 18%
Architected offline-first cart sync engine reducing order failures by 35%
Mentored team of 6 mobile developers on Flutter best practices and clean architecture
Built Flutter payment SDK used in 10,000+ merchant apps across India
Implemented UPI deep-link integration and biometric auth in Flutter
Reduced app ANR rate by 76% through systematic memory optimization
Developed custom Flutter widgets for real-time transaction animations
Early Flutter adopter at Paytm — migrated key modules from native to Flutter
Built QR code scanner widget processing 5M+ daily UPI transactions
Optimized Flutter rendering for 2G/3G networks and 1GB RAM devices
Contributed to Paytm's Flutter component library used across 8 internal apps

projects.title: NidhiPay
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered UPI & Banking App
projects.description: Full-featured fintech super-app built entirely in Flutter with UPI payments, AI-driven expense categorization, and biometric security. Custom offline transaction queue with conflict resolution. 99.97% uptime.

projects.title: LiveKart
projects.subtitle: Live Commerce & Video Shopping Platform
projects.description: India's fastest-growing live commerce platform built in Flutter. Features low-latency streaming (<300ms), in-stream checkout, and custom adaptive bitrate engine for Indian networks.

projects.title: DabbaRun
projects.subtitle: Hyperlocal Food Delivery Platform
projects.description: Complete food delivery platform with real-time order tracking, dynamic routing, and multi-language support in 8 Indian languages. Custom Flutter map widgets with smooth animations.

projects.title: MedConnect
projects.subtitle: Telemedicine & Health Platform
projects.description: Cross-platform telemedicine app with HD video consultations, health data sync from 15+ wearables, and AI symptom checker. Custom Flutter rendering for 60fps health data charts.

projects.title: FlutterKit
projects.subtitle: Open-Source Flutter Component Library
projects.description: Production-ready Flutter component library with 50+ customizable widgets, dark/light themes, and accessibility support. Used in 200+ projects worldwide.

caseStudy.problem: Rural Indian farmers needed a reliable UPI payment app that worked on low-end devices with spotty 2G/3G connectivity. Native development would double time and cost.
caseStudy.solution: Built an offline-first Flutter super-app with custom BLoC architecture, payment orchestration, AI expense categorization, and biometric security from a single codebase.
challenges: Flutter app optimized for 1GB RAM devices with Android 5.0+
Custom offline transaction queue with CRDT-based conflict resolution
Platform channels for native biometric and UPI deep-link integration
Flutter app size reduced to 12MB through tree shaking and asset optimization
